3082360.name: Vyn and Verdan
3082360.description:
Vyn and Verdan is a two-player co-op action roguelike!

You and your teammate work together and harness the powers of summer as Verdan and winter as Vyn to tame an overgrown forest! Upgrade abilities, dodge enemies, and defeat rooms of rogue bugs and wild vegetation.

Collaborate closely with your partner to win! Your influence over enemies greatly magnifies your partner's impact and vice versa, so working together yields the best results. You and your partner will have to coordinate attacks to achieve victory.

Vyn and Verdan is coming soon! Stay tuned for a demo. Join the Discord to see behind-the-scenes development, or subscribe to Substack to get short weekly updates via email.
3082360.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
